name: fan-browser-runtime-repo
description: Agent-first local browser runtime with stable observations, snapshot-bound actions, and human handoff primitives.
author: musk

scripts.check: tsc -b packages/protocol packages/runtime packages/node-client apps/cli --pretty false
scripts.preflight: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm pack --workspace @fan-browser-runtime/protocol --dry-run && npm pack --workspace fan-browser-runtime --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @fan-browser-runtime/node-client --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @fan-browser-runtime/cli --dry-run
